com.hp.workpath.api.deviceusage.printer

Class PrinterInfo

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.deviceusage.printer.PrinterInfo

  • public class PrinterInfo
extends java.lang.Object
    Provides methods to retrieve print job information
    Since:
    API 5

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  PrinterInfo.A4EquivalentByJobCategory
      A4Equivalent impressions of Job information by category
      class  PrinterInfo.ByColorMode
      Job information by colorMode
      class  PrinterInfo.ByJobCategory
      Job information by category
      class  PrinterInfo.ByJobCategoryAndMediaSize
      Job information by category and mediaSize
      class  PrinterInfo.CopyByMediaSize
      Copy impressions of Job information by mediaSize
      class  PrinterInfo.FaxByMediaSize
      Fax impressions of Job information by mediaSize
      class  PrinterInfo.PlexByMediaSize
      Plex sheets of Job information by mediaSize
      class  PrinterInfo.PrintByMediaSize
      Print impressions of Job information by mediaSize

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      PrinterInfo.A4EquivalentByJobCategory[] getA4EquivalentByJobCategory()
      Retrieves the A4Equivalent information by category.
      PrinterInfo.ByColorMode[] getByColorMode()
      Retrieves the information by color mode.
      PrinterInfo.ByJobCategory[] getByJobCategory()
      Retrieves the information by category.
      PrinterInfo.ByJobCategoryAndMediaSize[] getByJobCategoryAndMediaSize()
      Retrieves the information by category and mediaSize.
      Plex[] getByPrintPlex()
      Retrieves the plex mode of the print job.
      PrinterInfo.CopyByMediaSize[] getCopyByMediaSize()
      Retrieves the copy information by mediaSize.
      int getEngineCycles()
      Retrieves count of Engine Cycle
      PrinterInfo.FaxByMediaSize[] getFaxByMediaSize()
      Retrieves the copy information by mediaSize.
      PrinterInfo.PlexByMediaSize[] getPlexByMediaSize()
      Retrieves the plex information by mediaSize.
      PrinterInfo.PrintByMediaSize[] getPrintByMediaSize()
      Retrieves the print information by mediaSize.
      int getSheets()
      Retrieves total count of sheets

    • Method Detail

      • getSheets

        public int getSheets()
        Retrieves total count of sheets
        Returns:

        Number of sheets

        • Return value will be greater than or equal to zero

        Since:
        API 5

      • getEngineCycles

        public int getEngineCycles()
        Retrieves count of Engine Cycle
        Returns:

        engineCycles

        • Return value will be greater than or equal to zero

        Since:
        API 5

      • getByPrintPlex

        public Plex[] getByPrintPlex()
        Retrieves the plex mode of the print job.
        Returns:

        byPrintPlex array

        • Return value will be a array of Plex which contains information on plex and sheets

        Since:
        API 5

      • getByJobCategory

        public PrinterInfo.ByJobCategory[] getByJobCategory()
        Retrieves the information by category.
        Returns:

        byJobCategory array

        • Return value will be a array of PrinterInfo.ByJobCategory which contains information on job category and a4EquivalentDeciImpressions

        Since:
        API 5

      • getByJobCategoryAndMediaSize

        public PrinterInfo.ByJobCategoryAndMediaSize[] getByJobCategoryAndMediaSize()
        Retrieves the information by category and mediaSize.
        Returns:

        ByJobCategoryAndMediaSize array

        • Return value will be a array of PrinterInfo.ByJobCategoryAndMediaSize which contains information on job category, media size and impressions

        Since:
        API 5

      • getByColorMode

        public PrinterInfo.ByColorMode[] getByColorMode()
        Retrieves the information by color mode.
        Returns:

        ByColorMode array

        • Return value will be a array of PrinterInfo.ByColorMode which contains information on job category, color mode and impressions

        Since:
        API 5

      • getA4EquivalentByJobCategory

        public PrinterInfo.A4EquivalentByJobCategory[] getA4EquivalentByJobCategory()
        Retrieves the A4Equivalent information by category.
        Returns:

        ByColorMode array

        • Return value will be a array of PrinterInfo.ByColorMode which contains information on job category, color mode and impressions

        Since:
        API 7

      • getPrintByMediaSize

        public PrinterInfo.PrintByMediaSize[] getPrintByMediaSize()
        Retrieves the print information by mediaSize.
        Returns:

        printByMediaSize array

        • Return value will be a array of PrinterInfo.PrintByMediaSize which contains information on mediaSize, monoImpressions, colorImpressions and totalImpressions

        Since:
        API 7

      • getCopyByMediaSize

        public PrinterInfo.CopyByMediaSize[] getCopyByMediaSize()
        Retrieves the copy information by mediaSize.
        Returns:

        CopyByMediaSize array

        • Return value will be a array of PrinterInfo.CopyByMediaSize which contains information on mediaSize, monoImpressions, colorImpressions and totalImpressions

        Since:
        API 7

      • getFaxByMediaSize

        public PrinterInfo.FaxByMediaSize[] getFaxByMediaSize()
        Retrieves the copy information by mediaSize.
        Returns:

        FaxByMediaSize array

        • Return value will be a array of PrinterInfo.FaxByMediaSize which contains information on mediaSize, monoImpressions, colorImpressions and totalImpressions

        Since:
        API 7

      • getPlexByMediaSize

        public PrinterInfo.PlexByMediaSize[] getPlexByMediaSize()
        Retrieves the plex information by mediaSize.
        Returns:

        PlexByMediaSize array

        • Return value will be a array of PrinterInfo.PlexByMediaSize which contains information on mediaSize, monoImpressions, colorImpressions and totalImpressions

        Since:
        API 7
